title: Anne 16x
description: A clean and lightweight 16x PvP texture pack for Minecraft 1.8.9, designed to deliver smooth visuals and an optimized Bedwars experience.
body:
Anne16x is a smooth and modern 16x texture pack created for Minecraft 1.8.9, focusing on clean visuals, lightweight performance, and an enhanced PvP experience. Designed with simplicity and clarity in mind, the pack features refined textures, a custom clean GUI, and optimized items to create a polished and distraction-free gameplay environment.

With smooth swords, clear PvP visuals, and an FPS-friendly design, Anne16x helps improve visibility and responsiveness during fast-paced combat and bridging scenarios. The balanced aesthetic maintains a stylish look while preserving the familiar feel of Minecraft’s classic gameplay.

Perfect for Bedwars, Skywars, and everyday PvP matches, Anne16x delivers a fluid and competitive experience for players who prefer clean and performance-oriented textures. ✨🗡️
